name: Artichoke Hearts with Caviar
recipeIngredient: 1 can artichoke hearts (8 1/2 oz), drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cream cheese, sour cream, mayonnaise, and lemon juice in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Stir in the chopped artichoke hearts, onion, and garlic salt until combined.
3. Shape the mixture into a 5-inch mound on a serving plate.
4. Flatten the mound slightly and spread caviar over the top.
5. Serve with assorted crackers.
